I have created a specification to double the font size of the logo text in the Navbar.

**Specification:**

1.  **Component**: `components/Navbar.tsx`
2.  **Element**: The `h1` tag containing the text "Thriftly Treats".
3.  **Change**: Update the Tailwind CSS classes controlling the font size.
    *   Change `text-xl` (mobile default, ~20px) to `text-3xl` (~30px).
    *   Change `sm:text-2xl` (tablet/desktop, ~24px) to `sm:text-5xl` (~48px).
    *   This provides an approximate 2x increase in visual size across different screen widths while maintaining the `font-gugi` font family.

Here are the changes:

entries.description: Increased logo text size to text-3xl on mobile and text-5xl on larger screens.
